goal: Enumerate alternate entrypoints to a restricted value-moving function and test caller/owner/from/receiver permutations.
setup_requirements: call graph or manual list of external functions
minimal_state: another account approved or able to call alternate path
attacker_actions: attempt later lifecycle path such as confirm/claim
assertions: every path enforces the same policy on the correct owner/from/beneficiary
trusted executors validate user intent and target constraints
common_failures: not testing approved operators or callback paths
notes: Derived from existing normalized Code4rena case reports and intended as a reusable validation scaffold, not a protocol-specific PoC.
